apps.name: Agent Chess
apps.subtitle: Local chess matches for AI agents
apps.description: Run a local chess game where two AI agents join, play moves, and follow a live board.
apps.longDescription: Agent Chess is a TypeScript CLI for pitting two AI agents against each other in a local chess game. Agents join the same match, submit moves one turn at a time, can negotiate draws, and can watch the live board in a local web UI.
features: Two AI agents can join the same local game and play turn by turn
Built-in draw request and accept flow
Live local web UI for board state, move history, and replay

apps.name: Agentlytics
apps.subtitle: AI Coding Agent Analytics
apps.description: Comprehensive analytics dashboard for AI coding agents — Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, VS Code Copilot, Zed, Antigravity, OpenCode, Command Code. One command to turn scattered AI conversations into a unified analytics dashboard.
apps.longDescription: You switch between Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, VS Code Copilot, and more — each with its own siloed conversation history. Agentlytics gives you a full picture with one command: npx agentlytics. Dashboard with KPIs, activity heatmap, editor breakdown, coding streaks, token economy. Session search and full conversation replay. Cost estimation broken down by model, editor, project. Team context sharing via Relay with MCP integration. 100% local — no data ever leaves your machine.
features: Dashboard with KPIs and activity heatmaps
Cost estimation by model and editor
100% local — no data leaves your machine

apps.name: Appétit
apps.subtitle: Bon Appétit for Apps
apps.description: An Apple App Store-inspired catalog of free, tiny apps built with agentic engineering and vibecoding. Pure HTML/CSS/JS — no frameworks, no build step.
apps.longDescription: Appétit is an open-source, JSON-driven app store clone that showcases your projects in a beautiful, browsable catalog. Features a dark/light theme, sidebar navigation, featured carousel, app detail pages with screenshots, brew/npx install modals, instant search, and GitHub star counts. All content lives in a single apps.json file — edit it and deploy. Built entirely with vanilla HTML, CSS, and JS using agentic engineering and vibecoding. No frameworks, no build step, deploys anywhere as static files.
features: Dark and light theme with system preference
Featured carousel, app cards, detail pages
Brew / npx install modals with clipboard copy
Built with agentic engineering and vibecoding

apps.name: Bi'lokma
apps.subtitle: Prevent food waste.
apps.description: Application connecting bakeries with users for leftover food.
apps.longDescription: Application connecting bakeries with users for leftover food.

apps.name: check-ai
apps.subtitle: AI-Readiness Audit for Repos
apps.description: Audit any repository for AI-readiness. One command. 66 checks. Zero dependencies. Scans for agent configs, repo hygiene, grounding docs, testing safety nets, prompt templates, MCP integrations, AI dependencies — and scores it all on a 0–10 scale.
apps.longDescription: check-ai runs 66 checks grouped into 8 sections: Repo Hygiene, Grounding Docs, Testing Safety Net, Agent Configs, AI Context, Prompts & Skills, MCP integrations, and AI Dependencies. Each check is weighted by real-world impact and normalized to a 0–10 score with letter grades. Detects configs for Cursor, Windsurf, Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex, Gemini, Aider, and more. Interactive terminal output with animated score bars, or machine-readable JSON for CI pipelines. Zero dependencies — built entirely with Node.js built-ins.

apps.name: Damga
apps.subtitle: Digitalized loyalty cards.
apps.description: Damga is a digitalized loyalty cards app that allows you to manage your loyalty cards and points.
apps.longDescription: Damga is a digitalized loyalty cards app that allows you to manage your loyalty cards and points.

apps.name: Deeper
apps.subtitle: Messaging Analytics for Beeper
apps.description: A macOS messaging analytics app for Beeper — visualize your conversations across every platform, with on-device AI. See who you talk to most, discover your active hours, find ghosting patterns, explore group dynamics.
apps.longDescription: Deeper connects to your local Beeper Desktop app and turns your messaging data into beautiful, interactive analytics. It merges contacts across platforms (iMessage, WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram, Signal, X/Twitter, and more), analyzes sent vs received message patterns, and visualizes everything with native macOS charts and Liquid Glass effects. Uses Apple Intelligence (on-device) for conversation summaries — no cloud, no API keys. All data stays on your machine.
apps.requirements: macOS 26 Tahoe or later, Beeper Desktop
features: Word frequency analysis and word clouds
Liquid Glass UI with native macOS 26 design

apps.name: DodoClip
apps.subtitle: A free clipboard manager for macOS
apps.description: A lightweight, native clipboard manager that automatically saves everything you copy and provides instant access to your clipboard history.
apps.longDescription: A lightweight, native clipboard manager that automatically saves everything you copy and provides instant access to your clipboard history.

apps.name: DodoCount
apps.subtitle: Google Analytics in your menu bar
apps.description: A beautiful macOS menubar app for Google Analytics 4 and Search Console. Quick access to visitor data and search metrics.
apps.longDescription: A beautiful macOS menubar app for Google Analytics 4 and Search Console. Quick access to visitor data and search metrics.

apps.name: DodoNest
apps.subtitle: Organize your menu bar items
apps.description: A native macOS application for organizing and rearranging your menu bar items through drag-and-drop functionality and search.
apps.longDescription: A native macOS application for organizing and rearranging your menu bar items through drag-and-drop functionality and search.

apps.name: DodoPass
apps.subtitle: Native macOS password manager
apps.description: A native macOS password manager built with SwiftUI, featuring local AES-256-GCM encryption with optional iCloud sync. Touch ID unlock, auto-lock, and smart clipboard.
apps.longDescription: A native macOS password manager built with SwiftUI, featuring local AES-256-GCM encryption with optional iCloud sync. Touch ID unlock, auto-lock, and smart clipboard.

apps.name: DodoPulse
apps.subtitle: Real-time system monitoring in your menu bar
apps.description: A lightweight, native macOS menu bar app that displays real-time system metrics with beautiful mini graphs. Monitor CPU, memory, GPU, network, and more.
apps.longDescription: A lightweight, native macOS menu bar app that displays real-time system metrics with beautiful mini graphs. Monitor CPU, memory, GPU, network, and more.

apps.name: DodoService
apps.subtitle: Manage your Mac services from the menu bar
apps.description: A lightweight, native macOS menu bar app for managing Homebrew and Launchd services. Start, stop, restart services with smart categorization, pinning, and auto-refresh.
apps.longDescription: A lightweight, native macOS menu bar app for managing Homebrew and Launchd services. Start, stop, restart services with smart categorization, pinning, and auto-refresh.

apps.name: DodoShot
apps.subtitle: A beautiful screenshot tool for macOS
apps.description: Lightweight native macOS screenshot application with capture, annotation, and management capabilities. Inspired by CleanShot X, entirely free and open source.
apps.longDescription: Lightweight native macOS screenshot application with capture, annotation, and management capabilities. Inspired by CleanShot X, entirely free and open source.
features: Annotation tools with shapes and text

apps.name: DodoTidy
apps.subtitle: A native macOS system cleaner
apps.description: A native macOS application for system monitoring, disk analysis, and cleanup. Remove caches, logs, and temporary files with multiple safety mechanisms.
apps.longDescription: A native macOS application for system monitoring, disk analysis, and cleanup. Remove caches, logs, and temporary files with multiple safety mechanisms.

apps.name: Flappy Bird
apps.subtitle: Flappy Bird clone.
apps.description: Flappy Bird game built using React Native Skia.
apps.longDescription: Flappy Bird game built using React Native Skia.

apps.name: Flight Ticket
apps.subtitle: Flight ticket booking app.
apps.description: A basic flight ticket app that generates random tickets and removes them.
apps.longDescription: A basic flight ticket app that generates random tickets and removes them.
features: Smooth Animations: Enhanced with Reanimated for a fluid user experience.
Dynamic Ticket View: Utilizes react-native-svg for an interactive ticket display.

apps.name: Galaksinin Muhafızları
apps.subtitle: Galaksiyi Koru, Muhafızlarını Topla!
apps.description: A browser-based space action game. Defend the galaxy, collect guardians, upgrade your weapons, and fight through waves of enemies.
apps.longDescription: Galaksinin Muhafızları is a browser-based space action game built with pure HTML/CSS/JS. Use WASD to move, mouse to aim, and click to shoot. Features include a leveling system, in-game shop with upgrades (Mega Attack, Super Health, Light Speed, Titan Armor, Extra Ammo), the ability to summon knights, super powers, and life-steal mechanics. Fight through increasingly difficult waves, upgrade your guardian, and save the galaxy from darkness.

apps.name: git-rewrite-commits
apps.subtitle: AI-Powered Commit Message Rewriter
apps.description: AI-powered git commit message rewriter using Ollama or GPT. Automatically rewrite your entire git commit history with better, conventional commit messages.
apps.longDescription: Rewrite your entire git commit history with AI-generated conventional commit messages. Perfect for cleaning up messy histories before open-sourcing projects. Supports OpenAI GPT and local Ollama models for privacy. Features smart filtering to skip well-formed commits, multi-language support, git hooks integration for automatic messages on every commit, batch processing with rate limiting, dry-run mode, custom templates, and quality scoring. Always creates backups before rewriting.
features: OpenAI GPT or local Ollama support

apps.name: Istanbul
apps.subtitle: Ambient Istanbul Soundscapes
apps.description: A macOS menu bar app for ambient Istanbul soundscapes from BBC Rewind. 18 ambient recordings captured on location across Istanbul — perfect as background white noise for focus or relaxation.
apps.longDescription: Istanbul is a free, open-source macOS menu bar app that plays ambient sounds recorded in Istanbul on a continuous loop. Featuring 18 recordings from the BBC Rewind Sound Effects library: street atmosphere, spice market, covered bazaar, café backgammon, ferry crossings, Hagia Sophia interior, Blue Mosque, and more. Sounds download as MP3 on first play and are cached locally for offline use. Native Swift/SwiftUI — no Electron, no runtime dependencies.
features: Menu bar only — clean and minimal

apps.name: KOUmath
apps.subtitle: AI math solver.
apps.description: Photomath-like AI math solver with camera recognition.
apps.longDescription: Photomath-like AI math solver with camera recognition.

apps.name: Macabolic
apps.subtitle: A video and audio downloader for macOS
apps.description: A beautiful GUI for yt-dlp. Download videos and audio from YouTube and thousands of other supported sites with SponsorBlock, subtitle and playlist support.
apps.longDescription: A beautiful GUI for yt-dlp. Download videos and audio from YouTube and thousands of other supported sites with SponsorBlock, subtitle and playlist support.

apps.name: MCP Tools
apps.subtitle: Swiss Army Knife for MCP Servers
apps.description: A comprehensive CLI for interacting with MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers. Discover, call, and manage tools, resources, and prompts from any MCP-compatible server.
apps.longDescription: MCP Tools provides a versatile CLI for working with Model Context Protocol servers. Discover and call tools, access resources, create mock servers for testing, proxy MCP requests to shell scripts, create interactive shells, scaffold new MCP projects with TypeScript, and guard/restrict access to specific tools. Supports HTTP and stdio transports, multiple output formats (JSON, pretty-printed, table), server aliases, and LLM app config management. Built in Go.
features: Discover and call MCP server tools

apps.name: Mergen ADE
apps.subtitle: Organize multiple project terminals in one native workspace
apps.description: Native Rust terminal workspace for keeping multiple project contexts visible and easy to switch on macOS.
apps.longDescription: Mergen ADE is a desktop terminal workspace for running and organizing multiple project contexts. It keeps multiple terminals visible in a native Rust UI with tiled panes, project grouping, and lightweight persisted state. The project is still Windows-first, but official releases now include a signed and notarized macOS ARM64 DMG.
features: Embedded terminal panes with tiled layout management
Project-aware terminal grouping for fast context switches
Native PTY-backed shell sessions in a lightweight Rust desktop app
Small persisted config that restores useful workspace state

apps.name: Munch
apps.subtitle: Can you beat the computer at the game of Munch?
apps.description: Play the classic poison-apple strategy game in your browser and try to avoid the losing move.
apps.longDescription: Munch is a browser game where players take turns eating apples from a grid, and whoever is forced to eat the poison apple loses. This version pits you against a computer opponent built around a solved strategy for the 5x6 board.
apps.requirements: Web browser on desktop or mobile.
features: Play Munch instantly in the browser
Challenge a computer opponent using winning board states
Learn the poison-apple rules through live play

apps.name: My Net Worth
apps.subtitle: All your stocks, ETFs, crypto wallets, 401(k), on one page
apps.description: See stocks, ETFs, crypto wallets, retirement accounts, and debt on one page with hourly price updates and no account connections.
apps.longDescription: My Net Worth was built to put Fidelity 401(k)s, Vanguard investments, E-Trade and IBKR stocks, bank accounts, and crypto wallets on one page. It is intentionally simple and safe: nothing connects directly to your accounts, and live prices refresh hourly so you can track your full portfolio across TradFi and DeFi in one place.
apps.requirements: Chrome on Windows, Mac, Linux, iPhone, and Android.
features: Track traditional and crypto assets together on one page
Support Yahoo Finance symbols plus Bitcoin, Ethereum and EVM wallets, and Solana wallets
Keep accounts disconnected while prices refresh hourly

apps.name: My Plants
apps.subtitle: Auto plant watering app.
apps.description: IoT connected plant watering system.
apps.longDescription: IoT connected plant watering system.

apps.name: Number Match
apps.subtitle: Number match game app.
apps.description: This is a simple number matching game in Python.
apps.longDescription: The goal of the game is to find adjacent numbers on the board and match them. The higher the value of the matched numbers, the more points the player wins.

apps.name: PhilNav
apps.subtitle: Infrared head mouse for hands-free computer control
apps.description: Control your computer hands-free with a reflective sticker and a Raspberry Pi-powered infrared head mouse running at 75 FPS.
apps.longDescription: PhilNav is a custom infrared head mouse that lets you move the cursor hands-free by tracking a reflective sticker on your head. The software is open source on GitHub, and this listing points to the assembled Gumroad hardware package built by Philip Brocoum for accessibility-focused computing.
apps.requirements: Raspberry Pi hardware on the server side plus a Windows, Mac, or Linux client machine.
features: Hands-free cursor movement using infrared head tracking
Runs at 75 FPS with low-latency mouse control
Cross-platform client support for Windows, macOS, and Linux

apps.name: Poker Tracker
apps.subtitle: Track your live poker PnL with a simple web app
apps.description: Easily track your poker PnL.
apps.longDescription: Poker Tracker is a lightweight web app for tracking live poker winnings and losses over time. It focuses on fast entry and clear bankroll visibility without the overhead of a larger gambling analytics platform.
apps.requirements: Web browser on desktop or mobile.
features: Track poker winnings and losses in the browser
Keep a running PnL history for live play
Simple interface built for personal bankroll tracking

apps.name: Prompts.chat
apps.subtitle: Community Prompt Collection
apps.description: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
apps.longDescription: The largest community-driven prompt collection with over 151K GitHub stars. Originally known as Awesome ChatGPT Prompts, now evolved into a full web application. Browse, search, and contribute prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and other AI models. Features include community contributions, prompt categories, and the ability to self-host for your organization with complete privacy. Built with Next.js and TypeScript.

apps.name: Avalon
apps.subtitle: Visual prompt IDE for AI editing, reverse engineering, and image workflows
apps.description: Edit structured prompts, import community examples, reverse engineer images, and generate visuals from one privacy-first workspace.
apps.longDescription: Avalon is a privacy-first visual prompt IDE for image generation and other AI workflows. Build and manage prompts as structured JSON in a tree editor, ask an AI assistant to rewrite only the field you are focused on, expand rough ideas into production-ready prompt structures, reverse engineer uploaded images into reusable prompts, browse prompts.chat and import community examples, then generate images with fal.ai or Wiro.ai. Prompts persist locally, API keys stay in sessionStorage, and the app can be installed as a PWA for a more native feel.
apps.requirements: Modern browser; your own OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google API key for AI features. Optional fal.ai or Wiro.ai API key for image generation.
features: Visual tree editor for nested JSON prompt editing
Natural-language AI assistant that rewrites only the selected field
Prompt expander that returns scene, style, subjects, palette, composition, and negative guidance
Reverse engineer uploaded images into reusable prompts with confidence and model hints
Browse prompts.chat and import community prompts into your local prompt library
Generate images with fal.ai or Wiro.ai using model and size or aspect controls
Local-first prompt storage with session-only API key handling
Installable PWA with responsive dashboard and editor layouts

apps.name: Captioneer
apps.subtitle: On-device live captions, translation, and OBS-ready overlays for macOS
apps.description: Transcribe microphone audio locally, translate it in real time, and publish overlay captions for streams, recordings, and presentations.
apps.longDescription: Captioneer is a privacy-first macOS menu bar app for live speech transcription and translation. It listens to your microphone with on-device Apple speech recognition, translates finalized lines, renders captions in top, bottom, or floating overlays, and can continuously write the latest caption text to a local file for OBS workflows. It is built for streamers, presenters, and recordings that need low-friction live subtitles without a cloud account in the core app flow.
features: On-device speech recognition with local-first transcription flow
Real-time translation into a target language
Top, bottom, or floating live caption overlays
Local text-file output for OBS and streaming overlays
Menu bar controls and persistent overlay settings
No account required for the core caption workflow

apps.name: Wiro CLI
apps.subtitle: Terminal client for discovering models, running tasks, and watching progress on Wiro AI
apps.description: Search models, submit runs, manage auth, and monitor task progress from the command line with interactive setup and output downloads.
apps.longDescription: Wiro CLI is a terminal client for Wiro AI that covers model discovery, interactive run submission, task inspection, cancellation, and live progress watching. It supports interactive first-run setup, dynamic input prompts generated from model schemas, multiple auth header modes, WebSocket progress with polling fallback, automatic output downloads with readable filenames, and both npm and direct binary installation flows. Secrets are stored in macOS Keychain when available, with a local fallback store for other environments.
apps.requirements: Node.js 18+ for npm install, or use the standalone release binaries on macOS, Linux, or Windows.
features: Interactive first-run setup for API key, secret, and project selection
Model search and inspection from the terminal
Dynamic run prompts generated from model schema inputs
Live task progress via WebSocket with polling fallback
Task detail, cancel, and kill commands
Automatic output downloads with readable filenames
macOS Keychain integration with fallback local secret storage

apps.name: Wiro Models Cleaner
apps.subtitle: Chrome extension that filters and declutters the wiro.ai models catalog
apps.description: Hide unwanted providers, filter model cards, and speed up the Wiro models workflow with shortcuts and a persistent control panel.
apps.longDescription: Wiro Models Cleaner is a Manifest V3 Chrome or Chromium extension for power users of wiro.ai/models. It lets you hide Wiro models or any provider list you do not want to see, filter cards by keyword, show only selected providers, use partner multi-select directly from the page, and keep those preferences synced with chrome.storage.sync. It also injects a page control panel, watches SPA route changes, compacts the grid after filtering, and adds a Cmd or Ctrl+Enter shortcut for the Run button on model detail pages.
apps.requirements: Chrome or another Chromium-based browser with Developer Mode enabled; works on https://wiro.ai/models.
features: Hide Wiro model cards or any unwanted provider set
Filter model cards by provider, keyword, or allowlist
Partner multi-select directly from provider links and tags
Persistent in-page control panel with live stats
Cmd or Ctrl+Enter shortcut for the Run button
chrome.storage.sync settings with instant page updates
SPA route watching and MutationObserver-based re-application

apps.name: Maps
apps.subtitle: Google Maps clone built with React Native.
apps.description: Navigation and map exploration application.
apps.longDescription: Navigation and map exploration application.

apps.name: Shelf
apps.subtitle: Multiple Floating Docks for macOS
apps.description: Multiple floating shelves for apps, links, and snippets — right where you need them. Your macOS dock, powered up. One dock isn't enough.
apps.longDescription: Shelf gives you multiple floating shelves you can place anywhere on your screen — each one holding apps, web links, and text snippets. Like your macOS dock, but unlimited. Drag apps from Finder, links from your browser, or text from anywhere. Features smart drag & drop, horizontal or vertical layouts, icon magnification on hover, and frosted glass design. Built with SwiftUI and AppKit — no Electron, no web views. Pure macOS.
features: Menu bar app — no Dock icon clutter

apps.name: superportless
apps.subtitle: Keep the exact same localhost origin while switching worktrees per tab.
apps.description: A local dev router that lets each browser tab connect to a different server without changing host or port.
apps.longDescription: vercel/portless is a clever idea, but subdomains change the origin and often force updates to CORS settings, OAuth redirect URLs, and environment configs. superportless takes a different approach: each browser tab can connect to a different local server while keeping the exact same host and port, such as localhost:3000. That means no subdomains, no origin change, and no application config changes. Just open multiple tabs and test multiple worktrees in parallel.
apps.requirements: macOS or Linux. Source builds require Go 1.21+ and a C compiler.
features: Each browser tab can route to a different local server while keeping the same localhost host and port
Avoids subdomains and origin changes that would otherwise affect CORS, OAuth redirects, and environment settings
Lets you test multiple worktrees in parallel without teaching the application about the routing tool
Includes Next.js-specific support for HMR and /api/* routing during development

apps.name: Tater Talk
apps.subtitle: The simplest speech-to-text dictation web-app on Win/Mac/Nix
apps.description: The easiest way to talk to your computer on Win, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android, and the browser with optional bring-your-own premium speech models.
apps.longDescription: Tater Talk is a browser-based dictation app built to make talking to your computer feel simple across Windows, macOS, Linux, iPhone, Android, and the web. The current version adds a polished redesign and bring-your-own API key support for premium speech-to-text providers such as Microsoft Azure and AssemblyAI.
apps.requirements: Chrome on Windows, Mac, Linux, iPhone, and Android.
features: Works across Win, Mac, Linux, iOS, Android, and desktop browsers
Supports bring-your-own API keys for premium speech-to-text models

apps.name: Textream
apps.subtitle: A Free macOS Teleprompter
apps.description: Textream is a free, open-source macOS app that guides you through your script with three modes: word tracking (highlights each word as you say it), classic (constant-speed auto-scroll), and voice-activated (scrolls while you speak, pauses when you're silent). It displays your text in a sleek Dynamic Island-style overlay at the top of your screen.
apps.longDescription: Built for streamers, interviewers, presenters, and podcasters. Paste your script, hit play, and start speaking. Features include real-time word tracking with on-device speech recognition, a Dynamic Island overlay, floating window mode, fullscreen on Sidecar iPad, remote connection for viewing on any device, and Director Mode for live control. Supports PowerPoint notes import, multi-page scripts, and adjustable fonts and colors. Completely private — all processing happens on-device.
features: Real-time word tracking with on-device speech recognition

apps.name: Trip Invoice
apps.subtitle: Invoice generation and management app.
apps.description: Invoice generation and tracking system built with React Native.
apps.longDescription: Invoice generation and tracking system built with React Native.

apps.name: Wordle Game
apps.subtitle: Word guessing game.
apps.description: Word puzzle game built with React Native.
apps.longDescription: Word puzzle game built with React Native.
